The Unity Player Authentication REST API verifies player identity and manages authentication workflows. It provides endpoints for anonymous sign-in, platform-specific authentication (Google, Apple, Steam, Facebook), custom identity provider integration, token refresh, and account linking. Supports both the player-facing authentication flow and admin operations for player management.
